stagewise lives right inside your browser, makes changes in your local codebase and is compatible with all kinds of frameworks and setups - allowing it to be retrofitted into any existing project. Our agent enables you to show and tell what you want to change - all while using your app on localhost and without having to switch to external tools. Making changes is as easy as selecting elements, giving a simple prompt like “make it green and put it in the top right corner”, and immediately seeing the result.

We're two founders from Germany who met while working at a B2B SaaS startup. With Glenn's background in building dev tools for enterpries (Rheinmetall, Miele), as well as Julians experience in building web apps used by thousands (saasmetrix, strukto.io), we have the unique blend of experience and product sense needed to build this.

After making our initial launch with the open-sourced toolbar that puts your favorite coding agent right inside your browser and going viral with it, we’re now launching a high-speed coding agent dedicated to frontend development - taking our product and the experience of our users to the next level.

Our vision is to replace frontend devs completely, by gradually enabling both the backend devs, but also less technical designers and product managers to create well-designed applications. We start with developers who lack design experience, but our ultimate goal is to change how products are built.
one_liner: The coding agent built for the web

name: Fleetline
long_description: Fleetline is building the first complete-context algorithmic load planner for mid to large-sized trucking fleets. Today’s dispatchers face an overwhelming task: balancing regulations, customer demands, live fleet data, and individual driver needs, all while coordinating across siloed tools and teams. Mistakes run rampant, and each mistake is thousands of dollars. Even the select fleets using algorithms that have fleet-wide context struggle: the outputs are rigid, hard to interpret, and are blind to real-world nuances like driver preferences and schedule exceptions. Fleetline solves this by combining advanced optimization with LLMs that can easily adapt algorithms to each fleet’s needs and capture driver-specific information. The result is smarter planning truly optimized for every fleet and its drivers.
one_liner: Optimizing fleet planning with data driven algorithms

name: TectoAI
long_description: We help your company identify roles that can be filled by agentic AI tools, onboard them quickly, monitor their performance and behavior post deployment, ensure they remain compliant, and aligned with regulations. Tecto is building the governance platform for managing the AI stack!
one_liner: A Platform for AI Governance

name: RowFlow
long_description:
RowFlow replaces clunky web forms with natural conversations that run over text, slack, or wherever your users are. Our platform increases your form’s response rates while cutting your internal overhead in half. 

With RowFlow, you can take any existing form and instantly convert it into an AI-powered conversation. New flows launch in minutes and reach respondents over your preferred channel or embedded chat. We guide the exchange, follow up automatically, and return clean structured data without extra work from your team.

Forms power billions of business interactions yearly. Whether it’s forms for client intake, registrations, compliance, feedback, or surveys, they all follow the same painful pattern: low conversion, messy data, and frustrated users. Teams have long tolerated forms only because there's been no scalable alternative for collecting structured information from people - until now. Our goal is for RowFlow to become the new default way for how organizations collect user data in an AI-first world.
one_liner: Replacing forms with AI conversations

name: NOSO LABS
long_description: In the home services industry, field technicians are expected to handle three key tasks: diagnosing issues, making sales, and completing paperwork. It's rare to find individuals who excel at all three. We build AI agents to support technicians by improving diagnostic accuracy and helping them capture sales opportunities.
one_liner: Build AI agents for field technicians to diagnose and sell 10x better

name: Paloma
long_description: We unify your contracts, service consumption, and customer relationship context so that your revenue, success and sales teams can operate from the same ground truth. With everything centralized, you can proactively react to customer signals for upsell and churn while billing is seamlessly handled in the background.
one_liner: AI-native CRM for putting post-sales operations on autopilot

name: Mixy
long_description:
Live out your DJ dreams with Mixy, the mind-blowing music app that lets you mash-up any song in seconds.

⁕ Add your songs
⁕ Instantly blend vocals and beats
⁕ Play and share your mashup anywhere

There’s no limit to your imagination!

⁕ Launched to #1 in Music on June 19th
⁕ 1.5M users in 3 months
⁕ 15M mashups made and growing
one_liner: Make mashups without knowing how to DJ

name: Lapis
long_description:
Lapis gives businesses the ability to generate on-brand advertising creatives using AI. It uses existing assets like logos, colors, fonts, and product images, and automatically creates image ads that match a company's visual identity and voice across Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and Google.

With Lapis, businesses can rapidly iterate on creatives and A/B test at scale without being bottlenecked by design and creative capacity.

Lapis is used by 1,000+ marketing teams, from big businesses like Hyundai and Tata to small businesses around the world, and supports 15+ languages including English, Spanish, and Italian.
one_liner: AI that creates on-brand image ads

name: Uplane
long_description:
Uplane replaces marketing agencies with AI. We generate hundreds of ads with matching landing pages and steer the ad spend across channels like Meta, Google, LinkedIn and others. By connecting to CRM and ERP data, Uplane learns what drives profits and continuously improves campaigns.

Companies waste billions on bad ads, mismatched landing pages, and poor budget allocation. Uplane fixes this by replacing a patchwork of agencies, spreadsheets, and siloed tools with one self-improving system. The result: Higher ROAS for enterprises and effortless, expert-level marketing for SMBs.
one_liner: Replace marketing agencies with AI

name: Zavo
long_description:
Zavo is the AI-powered operating system for restaurants.

We bring payments, point of sale, and AI agents into one unified platform, so restaurants can run their entire business seamlessly.

From reservations to payments to POS, Zavo replaces fragmented tools with a fully integrated stack built in-house. Our AI agents automate repetitive tasks, streamline operations, and help teams focus on delivering great guest experiences.
one_liner: AI Operating System for Restaurants

name: Nexus
long_description: Nexus enables non-technical teams in large organizations to build production-ready AI agents without code.
one_liner: We help non-technical teams build AI agents without engineers

name: Bolna AI
long_description:
Bolna handles the complexity of voice infra, so enterprises can automate calls faster, better, and cheaper, at scale

Bolna is a Voice AI Orchestration platform purpose-built for Indian enterprises.
Businesses in India run tens of thousands of calls every day - across sales, support, collections, recruitment, and more. Bolna gives them the power to build and deploy Voice AI Agents directly from their transcripts and FAQs, so they can start automating calls immediately.

With Bolna, enterprises get:

1. Full control over agent intelligence, tone, and workflows
2. Cost efficiency at scale with smart routing across providers and price points
3. Enterprise-grade performance on latency, interruptions, multi-language, and multi-accent understanding
one_liner: Voice AI to enable India's next billion

name: Hyperspell
long_description:
Hyperspell is the Memory & Context Layer for AI Agents.

AI agents are clueless geniuses. They crush humans on any standardized test, but wouldn't last a day at a real job. What today's super-intelligent agents are missing is the real world context they are operating in. A context that humans stitch together from hundreds of data points across dozens of interactions and channels. A context that grows with their tasks.

Hyperspell gives AI agents this context by connecting to their user’s workspace data and building a personalized memory and context layer.
one_liner: Memory for AI Agents

name: Scoop
long_description: We’re building AI agents that speed up drug trials by automating the manual consolidation and document prep required for every IND submission. Today, biotechs spend months stitching together reports from contractors and internal teams just to file and get to their first-in-human trial.
one_liner: Automating regulatory submissions for life sciences

name: Aspect
long_description:
With our visual understanding engine & platform, Aspect processes dense multimodal datasets, providing tools for segmentation, QC, structured schema extraction. 

Companies today have access to Glean and Notion Agents for working with vast text corpuses - Aspect is enabling that for multimodal data.
one_liner: AI Visual Understanding for Multimodal Data

name: Caddy
long_description:
Caddy is the operating system that works proactively for you. It learns how you work and acts on your behalf, keeping work moving while your context and voice stay intact.

Instead of producing generic AI output, Caddy creates real work artifacts that sound like you and fit how you actually work. Today, it operates across the tools you use every day, including email, calendar, Slack, Linear, and Notion.

Caddy is built by the team behind Loom’s AI and core product. We believe the next era of computing is software that understands intent, handles ambiguous work, and quietly gets work done in the background.
one_liner: Your partner for everyday work, lives in iMessage

name: The Context Company
long_description:
Understand user patterns and find silent failures in your AI agents.

The Context Company helps teams analyze AI agent conversations to surface user behavior patterns, performance trends, and moments where agents struggle - so teams know what’s working, what’s not, and what to improve next.

We turn raw conversations into structured signals: topic clustering, user feedback analysis, custom pattern tracking, and alerts. All alongside traditional observability like traces, tool calls, latency, and costs.

Get started in less than 10 lines of code.
one_liner: Monitor AI agents and understand user behavior

name: Norra
long_description: Norra helps nursing facilities manage equipment operations. Every year, ~$80 billion are spent on medical equipment like beds, concentrators, and wheelchairs. Nursing facilities continue to operate with zero visibility which leads to $15 billion in equipment waste annually. We use physical trackers and AI agents to eliminate this.
one_liner: Automating equipment operations for nursing facilities

name: Bron
long_description:
Bron is the ChatGPT for sports betting. Find +EV bets across 150+ sportsbooks and prediction markets, build parlays automatically, and surface the best bets of the day — in seconds.

Download Bron on the App Store here: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/bron-ai-sports-analysis/id6761323087
one_liner: ChatGPT for Sports Betting

name: Nessie
long_description:
Nessie is building personal AI brains that augment human cognition.

Nessie turns your scattered AI conversations and documents into a shareable AI brain you actually own. It's a thinking partner that lets you instantly search your entire history of ideas, synthesize them into new insights, and watch your knowledge build on itself over time.

Right now, your best thinking is trapped in ephemeral AI chat histories. Nessie unifies your context from ChatGPT, Claude, and (soon) Apple Notes/Google Docs/Notion/other context sources, auto-organizing the mess into an AI-enhanced brain.

Next, we are unlocking sharing. Instead of sending a static doc, you will be able to send your "Product Strategy Brain" to a cofounder, or publish your "Research Brain" for your entire team to chat with.

Who it's for: AI-native thinkers—founders, researchers, and writers—who believe their best ideas should compound.

The Team: We are two Yale CS grads and former Amazon engineers building the tool we needed for ourselves. We combine Anna's obsession with neuroscience and augmenting human cognition with Tiger's lifelong passion for building products (he shipped an app with 70k+ users at age 13).

Traction: Launched 3 weeks ago. We have over 1,200 users who have imported 300,000+ AI conversations into Nessie. 30% week-over-week organic user growth.

Origin Story: Nessie was born after we hit the 1-million-token limit in multiple Gemini chats. Overnight, months of research disappeared. We realized the problem wasn't just about storage; it was that the medium for AI-native thought didn't exist yet. The chat window is a place to ask questions, not a place to build a mind.

Our Vision: We are building a new medium for personal intelligence. Everyone will have an AI brain on Nessie. You will use it to think better, remember more, and share your mind with the world.
one_liner: Shareable AI Brains for Everyone

name: Semble AI
long_description:
Semble AI builds AI agents that design building-systems (fire, HVAC, plumbing, security). Construction companies use Semble to cut down weeks on commercial and residential projects. 

The $600B building-system integration industry still runs on spreadsheets and manual drawings, even as building codes rapidly evolve and become more localized. It’s a massive blind spot for the tech world. 

Jonathan and Ethan met studying computer science at Stanford. Jonathan worked at Convergint, one of the world's largest building system integrators, specifically for the purpose of learning how this industry works. Ethan is obsessed for a different reason: His house burned down in a wildfire in 2017.

They are determined to make Semble the industry standard for construction design.
one_liner: Autonomous building-system design for construction companies.

name: Mod AI
long_description:
We're building the first fully autonomous accounts payable platform.

Our AI clerks handle your entire AP workflow: invoice processing, GL coding, PO matching, approvals, responding to vendors, fraud detection and reporting. From the moment an invoice hits your inbox to the moment it's paid, no manual steps required.

We integrate with 16+ ERPs including QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, Dynamics 365, and Workday.

Find out why enterprise teams choose Mod AI at usemod.ai.
one_liner: Touchless AP Automation

name: SellRaze
long_description:
SellRaze is an AI-powered selling assistant that helps anyone sell anything in seconds. Point your camera at any item and we'll identify it, price it, and create an engaging listing across multiple marketplaces, including our own.

Each day, more than 2,500 items are added to SellRaze, representing over $326,000 in inventory value.
one_liner: The fastest way to sell online.

name: Terrain
long_description: Stealth
one_liner: Stealth

name: Unsiloed AI
long_description:
AI teams spend 6+ months building document workflows, yet fewer than 10% ever reach production. Generic LLM parsers and OCR collapse on multimodal documents with text, tables, images, and charts. Poor parsing and suboptimal chunking cripple RAG pipelines and downstream automation. Unsiloed AI has built state-of-the-art vision models which serves as the infrastructure layer for turning unstructured data into structured, queryable, and LLM-ready assets.

Our APIs are already parsing hundreds of thousands of documents for startups and NASDAQ-listed enterprises, powering vertical AI solutions across industries. On public benchmarks, Unsiloed AI consistently outperforms solutions from LlamaIndex, Gemini, Mistral, and Unstructured.io among others.
one_liner: API for parsing multimodal unstructured data

name: Allus AI
long_description: Allus builds next-gen vision foundation models that bring real intelligence to manufacturing. Enabling factories to see, understand, and improve production in real time.
one_liner: Transforming manufacturing with our next-gen Vision Foundation Model

name: Sciloop
long_description: Sciloop creates expert-level math and physics problems that frontier AI models can't solve, then sells the data to AI labs for training and evaluation. Our problems are created by IPhO and IMO medalists — the top 0.01% of STEM talent globally. On our benchmark, models like GPT 5.4 Pro and Gemini 3.1 Pro score 0-5% on our hardest problems. We work with AI labs to supply continuous, fresh training data that pushes the frontier of mathematical and scientific reasoning. Founded by Bilal and Osman, International Physics Olympiad medalists from MIT with hands-on ML research experience at MIT CSAIL.
one_liner: Expert STEM reasoning data for frontier AI labs.

name: Aleph Lab
long_description: An AI companion that chats and plays with children inside games like Minecraft, helping them learn a new language while they play. Kids already spend hours each week in their favorite games, and now parents can turn that game time into learning time.
one_liner: AI language buddy in the games kids love

name: Rovr
long_description: Rovr streamlines engineering operations by automating intake, triage, routing, and cross-team coordination. It replaces internal forms, manual Slack triage, and scattered docs with an AI front desk that understands requests, assigns owners, updates context, and posts status changes directly into Slack. Rovr’s built-in ops CRM gives teams a single system of record for eng requests — from tooling access to platform incidents to dev-infra workflows — reducing operational drag across the entire org.
one_liner: AI FDE Engine that runs your engineering workflows

name: Lexi
long_description: At Lexi, we are building AI associates for Corporate Law. Our associates learn your firm's standards and improve with every case, having already handled 135,000+ documents across 7,000+ cases.
one_liner: AI Associates for Corporate Law

name: Compyle
long_description:
Compyle is a less autonomous coding agent that asks before it acts. We're like Cursor or Claude Code - but you won't need to rewrite your codebase every time you use it for more than a small task.

We built Compyle because we were frustrated with the direction other coding agents are headed. They're all racing to be more autonomous, running for hours without human input.

This doesn't work for real production code. When agents run autonomously, they make countless small decisions that pile up in your codebase. Engineers lose ownership - they don't know what was implemented, can't effectively debug or maintain it, and struggle to build on top of it. The code becomes a black box, and they're forced to throw it away.

Compyle keeps engineers in the driver's seat.
one_liner: The coding agent that actually collaborates with you

name: Thesis
long_description:
We are accelerating AI research and development. Our aim is to help researchers uncover the next AlphaFold or build the next Transformer, faster, more systematically, and at scale. We treat discovery not as a matter of luck, but as an intelligent search problem.

By giving researchers access to an autonomous AI research lab, Thesis lets you build powerful machine learning models for anything imaginable. Every major breakthrough in AI over the next decade will be made on Thesis.
one_liner: Accelerating AI R&D

name: Inspector
long_description: Inspector is the AI IDE for designers to ship to prod. Just select any element on your live front end, edit it like you would in Figma, and Inspector writes the changes straight to your codebase.
one_liner: AI IDE for front-end development

name: Cortex AI
long_description:
Cortex AI builds the world’s most diverse and large-scale real-world workplace robot & egocentric dataset — where the physical world becomes the next training and evaluation set for embodied AI.

We power frontier labs developing robotics foundation models and general-purpose robots by providing the data they need:
1️⃣ Egocentric Data — real-workplace human video with hand/body pose, depth, and subtask labels.
2️⃣ Robot Data — trajectories collected from manipulators and humanoids in real industry settings.
3️⃣ Human-in-the-Loop Rollouts & Evals — real-world deployments with remote operators who recover robots when they fail, capturing data that feeds back into training and continuously improves models.

Additionally, through the Cortex Marketplace, workplaces get paid to host data-collection and evaluation sessions, while labs access the in-the-wild data that truly matters. This draws on Lucas’s previous experience as co-founder of Carousell, a C2C marketplace that scaled to a $1B+ valuation.
one_liner: Large-scale real-world robot & human data for embodied AI

name: Leadbay
long_description:
Leadbay (YC F25) discovers and qualifies SMB leads that couldn't be found before. Small-to-enterprise teams use us to prospect the most low-data-low-signals industries like construction, hospitality, even startups.

Co-founders are Milan Stankovic (CTO) - PhD to make AI work with limited data, and Ludovic Granger (CEO). 

Try us on leadbay.ai.
one_liner: Discover and qualify SMB leads that couldn't be found before.

name: Patent Watch
long_description:
We automate patent infringement detection. Our software interprets patents, identifies competing products, and generates claim charts showing who’s infringing and how.

Teams use us to:

- Find licensing and litigation targets
- Send cease-and-desist letters
- Find counter litigation
- Sell IP in wind-downs
- Accelerate M&A diligence

We also run AI invalidity and prior-art searches to help your patents hold up in court.

Companies spend up to $50k to file and maintain a single patent over its lifetime, but once it's granted, they let it collect dust. With Patent Watch, you can start turning your patent portfolio into revenue in 10 minutes.
one_liner: AI for detecting patent infringements

name: Anto Biosciences
long_description:
Anto is building a foundation model for microbial communities, making the gut microbiome computable for the first time. We predict drug toxicity and efficacy across diverse populations and fix drugs so they work for everyone — solving the hidden root cause of most drug failures. 

Founded by Arvid (Broad Institute of MIT and Harvard; Nature-published researcher who pioneered quality-aware, goal-directed sparsification) and David (Harvard Medical School Gastroenterology, J&J), second-time founders who published the breakthrough at leading machine learning AI conferences and Nature.
one_liner: A Foundation Model for Microbial Communities.

name: Sourcebot
long_description:
Sourcebot is an open source code understanding platform for massive codebases. We’re used by thousands of engineers in some of the largest companies in the world, including NVIDIA, Red Hat, Wikimedia, and Arista Networks.

Understanding code, not writing it, is the primary bottleneck for large engineering teams. For developers, this means onboarding onto complex codebases faster. For AI agents, it means getting the necessary code context to minimize hallucinations and maximize cohesion within the wider codebase.

Sourcebot solves this by giving developers and AI agents the ability to regex search across millions of lines of code instantly, as well as ask questions across thousands of repos using any flagship reasoning model. Being open source and on-prem, we can get deployed in enterprises within minutes before other tools even get approval.

We met a decade ago at McGill University and have been building together full time for over 2 years. We’ve personally felt the pain of understanding large codebases while working at Microsoft, EA, Ubisoft, Google, and Meta.
one_liner: Helping humans and AI agents understand massive codebases

name: Philon
long_description: Building open-source general-purpose robots capable of performing unsafe, repetitive or boring tasks.
one_liner: General Purpose Robots

name: Primer
long_description: Primer is an AI agent that sells, onboards, and supports users automatically through live, personalized walkthroughs.
one_liner: AI Product Demos

name: Lemma
long_description: Lemma catches the silent, semantic failures your observability tools miss, where your AI agent looks like it worked but didn’t. We scan every trace to surface issues before users complain, identify root causes, and help you fix them without manual digging, so your agents improve over time.
one_liner: Reliability platform for AI agents

name: Exonic
long_description:
What if you could train a biological foundation model on... the entire internet?

Exonic is pioneering a new generation of biological foundation models, focused on heterogeneous, unstructured, and noisy datasets.

Our first application is the design of safer gene therapies.

In 2025, we used AI to set a new state of the art in liver cancer targeted gene therapy, validated in vitro in our lab in San Francisco.

So far in 2026, we have trained a new model with unprecedented zero-shot generalization on genomic regulatory expression in hold-out biosample datasets. More to be shared soon.
one_liner: Unsupervised Biological AI

name: Freeport Markets
long_description: Freeport turns the sources you already trust (starting with Twitter) into a tradable feed. Our AI analysts track breaking news across social and financial media, distill what matters, and translate it into actionable trade ideas so you’re never late when markets move.
one_liner: Tradable Twitter Feed

name: Boom AI
long_description:
Boom reaches out to your customers before you lose them.

We run proactive outbound conversations at scale: recovering churned users, re-engaging drop-offs, and protecting revenue you thought was gone. AI agents hold real conversations with your customers over SMS, email, WhatsApp, or phone, in their language, on the channel they actually answer.

Every month, companies lose 5-15% of revenue to churn, and more walks out through abandoned signups and failed onboarding. The tools built to fix this don't work. Win-back emails get ignored. Cancel flows only catch people at the door. Hiring humans doesn't scale. Boom does the one thing that works: a real conversation. 1,000x the reach of manual outreach, and the customer can reply.
one_liner: AI agents that recover lost revenue through real conversations.

name: DiligenceSquared
long_description:
DiligenceSquared delivers AI-powered market due diligence for investment decisions - like the $500k McKinsey reports, but automated, auditable, and at a fraction of the cost.

When Private Equity funds evaluate deals, they pay firms like McKinsey, BCG, and Bain $500K-$1M for market due diligence. The process takes weeks, and the output is a static PowerPoint that's impossible to audit. A single large-cap PE fund can spend >$30M annually on this and the total market is $10B per year.

Our AI agents conduct expert interviews and synthesize insights with every claim linked to source transcripts. No black box, no "trust me" slides, and no 10x mark-up for human labor.

Frederik bought these reports as a Principal at Blackstone. Soren sold them as a Principal at BCG. Harshil is a repeat founder and former Software Engineer at Google. We've seen both sides and know what matters in due diligence - and now we automate it.

Our clients already include 8 leading private equity funds with over $2.4 trillion in combined AUM.
one_liner: AI-powered market due diligence for investment decisions

name: Clicks
long_description: Clicks is the AI-native BPO backed by Y Combinator. We replace traditional BPOs and shared service centers by automating back-office work with AI agents that operate your existing tools and follow your existing processes. We achieve higher accuracy and faster turn-around times at a fraction of the cost, with SOC 2 Type 2 and HIPAA compliance built in.
one_liner: AI agents for your back-office operations.

name: Amika
long_description:
Amika is infra to build your software factory.

We give your team sandboxed AI coding agents in the cloud: the same infrastructure Ramp, Coinbase, and Stripe built in-house. Kick off work from a web UI, CLI, Slack, or API. Use your preferred coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.). Each agent understands your codebase, runs autonomously, and ships real PRs with live previews of the apps it changed. Use it as your daily driver or plug it into your own code-gen pipeline via API.
one_liner: Infra to build your own software factory

name: Openroll
long_description:
Openroll is an AI-powered workspace for people and finance teams.

Openroll lets teams automate recurring work and run fully auditable workflows across their systems.

Compensation, headcount, and budgeting in one platform.

Learn more at https://www.openroll.com
one_liner: The AI workforce for People and Finance teams

name: Rivet
long_description:
Rivet is a visual AI editor for product designers to make UI changes.  Designers ship the changes they make directly to their codebase. 

The most painful problem for designers today is that their vision doesn't match code.  Rivet replaces slow collaboration between designers and engineers by letting designers just do it themselves. Rivet's editor helps turn product designers into design engineers.
 
Design-led companies in YC are Rivet customers.

Learn more at rivet.design
one_liner: Visual editor to design in production code

name: Ndea
long_description:
Ndea is building frontier AI systems that blend intuitive pattern recognition and formal reasoning into a unified architecture.

# AI for Scientific Advancement

Unlike all life before us, humanity's ascent is a story of ingenuity, not just biological evolution. Our progress has been driven by the curiosity to acquire knowledge, the ability to pass it on, and an intrinsic drive to innovate. We build technology which gives us leverage beyond our biology.

We stand at the top of a knowledge and technology colossus that we collectively created over the past ten thousand generations. Scientific progress has helped us overcome burdens that long defined human life — famines, plagues, and widespread illiteracy. Science will continue to redefine the boundaries of the human condition.

Today, the acceleration of scientific progress hinges on one factor: AI capable of independent invention and discovery. This capacity is the gateway to advancements beyond our wildest imagination.

# A New Research Lab

We're starting Ndea — an AI research and science lab. The name - like 'idea' with an 'n' - is inspired by the Greek concepts ennoia (intuitive understanding) and dianoia (logical reasoning), capturing our first goal to merge deep learning with program synthesis.

Ndea is entirely focused on developing and operationalizing AGI to realize unprecedented scientific progress in our lifetime for the benefit of all current and future generations.

Building AGI alone is a monumental undertaking, but our mission is even bigger. We're creating a factory for rapid scientific advancement — a factory capable of inventing and commercializing N ideas.

From our vantage point today, we see many 'known' frontiers like self-driving vehicles, drug discovery, sustainable energy, robotics, and space exploration. While AGI will benefit all of these, the most exciting adventure lies in the 'unknown'. AGI promises discoveries and progress we cannot imagine today.
one_liner: Building AGI that can innovate.

name: LegalOS
long_description:
LegalOS is an AI-native immigration law firm that combines cutting-edge technology with 40+ years of legal expertise.

We’ve studied 12,000 successful petitions to design our process - which allows us to deliver top-quality visa applications in as quickly as 48 hours. Our specialized AI agents draft petition narratives, compile evidence, and anticipate USCIS objections - work that traditionally takes attorneys weeks, if not months.

Every case is reviewed and signed by licensed immigration attorneys with 40+ years of experience, so companies get both speed and reliability. We support O-1, H-1B, L-1A, L-1B, TN, EB-1A, EB-1C, and EB-2 NIW petitions.

Our unique approach works. We’ve filed dozens of visa applications and have a 100% approval rate so far.

The U.S. processes 1M+ work visas annually—a market where incumbents still operate on fax machines, email, and 1990s case management software. We're building the modern immigration law firm.
one_liner: The AI-Native Immigration Law Firm

name: RamAIn
long_description:
RamAIn can intelligently automate any super complex and repetitive process across applications (Browser & Desktop) super fast. It doesn’t matter whether you have API access or not - if you can see it, RamAIn can do it. 

Simply chat with it and get your UI task as a composable API - fully managed, self-healing and self-evolving!
one_liner: Automate any UI task with natural language

name: IncidentFox
long_description: AI SRE agents that automatically learn each customer’s system so they work just like an in-house engineer.
one_liner: AI SRE agent that triages, coordinates, and fixes production incidents

name: Seeing Systems
long_description:
We engineer inexpensive, autonomous strike drones designed to operate in the most contested combat environments on Earth!

By combining true hardware modularity with an agentic control system that lowers cognitive load on operators, we enable faster upgrades, broader adoption, and more than 2x reduction in lifecycle cost.

Our customers and partners include the UK Royal Marine Commandos, several other units in the UK, and 4 other NATO forces, and we are currently shipping prototypes for iterative feedback.

Think of us as Anduril, but with worse weather, and better banter.
one_liner: Modular AI-Commanded Drones for Defence

name: Bubble Lab
long_description:
Bubble Lab turns natural language into visual, production-ready workflows — built for modern ops teams, with built-in observability, logs, and execution traces.

Deploy to Slack in one click so your team can build and run workflows from anywhere.
one_liner: Prompt once, automate forever.

name: Archal
long_description: Archal lets you test agents and code that touch third-party APIs without hitting the real services. We build working digital twins that hold state across requests and behave like the originals, so you catch bugs before your agent does something irreversible in production.
one_liner: The eval platform for autonomous software

name: Voxel Energy
long_description:
The best grid connection is no grid connection. Voxel builds vertically integrated energy generation and storage systems for data centers that bypass utility connection delays. 

By leveraging the vast supply of second-life EV batteries and our novel DC microgrid architecture, Voxel generates datacenter power on site and drastically reduces system cost and time-to-power.
one_liner: Energy independent data centers with solar and repurposed batteries.

name: Superset
long_description: Superset helps engineers run 100s of coding agents in parallel.
one_liner: The IDE for the AI Agents Era

name: Datoric
one_liner: Responsibly sourced data for multimodal AI

name: Grade
long_description: Grade is the API for performance-based payroll. Think of us like Deel or Gusto, but our payouts are for work completed, not hours. Companies use Grade to pay AI agents and contractors based on results: tasks completed, targets hit, work delivered. We handle compliance, tax reporting, and global payouts.
one_liner: API for performance-based payroll

name: Tsenta
long_description:
Tsenta is a desktop app that matches you with jobs, optimizes your profile & applies on your behalf. It runs on your device, so you have granular control over every application being submitted in real-time.

We built Tsenta after applying to over 3,000 jobs manually, so that nobody else would have to.

Check us out at https://tsenta.com :)
one_liner: We match you with jobs and apply automatically

name: Carrot Labs
long_description: We build specialized LLMs for your business’s specific workflows and use cases, then continuously hone them against your success metrics, capturing your proprietary know-how in the model so it gets more valuable and harder to copy as you grow.
one_liner: Continuous Fine-Tuning for AI Models

name: Shofo
long_description:
We are building the world’s largest video library. We've aggregated billions of videos into a searchable index and use agents to find and label the exact datasets a lab needs on demand.

If a lab needs 100K hours of cooking videos where someone is holding a pan, with reasoning annotations on top, our agents search the index, extract the matching subset, route it through our labeling pipeline, and deliver a custom dataset in days, not months.
one_liner: The World's Largest Video Library

name: Hedge
one_liner: AI native specialty insurance company

name: Korso
long_description:
Korso builds AI agents that handle the operational work manufacturers still do manually, including processing RFQs, following up on quotes, coordinating with suppliers, and keeping production on track when things go wrong. Our agents plug into your existing ERP and CRM, understand your workflows, and act on your behalf: triaging incoming requests, chasing delayed orders, notifying customers, and escalating when human judgment is needed.

We built Korso around the reality that enterprise systems cannot afford mistakes. Every agent action passes through verification layers, tools are scoped, and critical operations go through dry-run validation and secondary review. Full audit trails mean you can see exactly what was done, why, and when.

Most AI automation breaks down at the ERP integration layer. Korso's orchestration is built for the messiness of real manufacturing systems, with long-running workflows that span weeks and checkpointing that never loses progress.

Instead of replacing your systems, Korso makes them work harder, so your team spends less time on coordination and more time on the work that actually matters.
one_liner: The Intelligence Layer for Manufacturing.

name: primitive
long_description: Building the communication infrastructure needed for fully autonomous agents
one_liner: Communication for agents

name: Rudus
long_description: Rudus is an AI-powered takeoff and estimation platform built for concrete contractors. We cut takeoff time by 70% and help estimators bid 2-5× more projects without adding headcount. From plan upload to bid package, every part of the workflow gets faster.
one_liner: AI Takeoffs Built for Concrete

name: matforge
long_description:
We build AI scientists that discover new materials for the semiconductor industry - specifically datacenters and fabs. Finding novel materials today takes 10+ years of lab work. We aim to compress that timeline to months, using a swarm of AI agents.

Akash completed his PhD at Stanford on material discovery for semiconductors. The materials he discovered for nanoscale interconnects have been adopted into the roadmaps of Intel and TSMC. Advaith was the founding applied scientist at Persona AI (acquired by Luma Labs), where he built long horizon autonomous agents for major telecom and crypto companies.

Power consumption and heat release from AI chips is doubling every year. The semiconductor industry needs new materials to keep this exponential going - Matforge will help find them.
one_liner: AI scientists to discover semiconductor materials

name: InLoop Robotics
long_description:
We are building AI-native fulfillment powered by robotics.
Warehouses without human labor that get better, faster, and cheaper with every order.

Most robotics companies wait until their system is perfect before deploying. We don't. We ship imperfect policies into real warehouses, detect failures in real time, recover automatically when we can, and bring in a remote human operator when we can't.

Every failure becomes training data. Every intervention makes the system better. The result is a fulfillment system that continuously learns from production.
one_liner: Deploying robots that ask for help!

name: Hub.xyz
one_liner: API for real-world training data.

name: Pulsent
long_description:
Pulsent continuously watches how your users and interacts with your product and engages them at the right moment to convert, upsell, and retain. 

As companies scale, founders, account managers and customer success teams can only take care of a small fraction of users. The rest receive generic, annoying and poorly timed communication. Opportunities are missed, customers churn, and revenue is lost.

The core problem is that user behavior is fragmented across tools like PostHog, Stripe, Salesforce, etc., making it impossible to understand users in real time. We unify all data into a single view and let AI agents act on top. This only recently became possible with advances in visual AI (dec ‘25), allowing agents to watch sessions and understand behavior at human or better level.

Pulsent detects expansion and churn signals, prioritizes high-value accounts, and executes through AI agents across channels like email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp. It increases conversion and reduces churn without adding headcount.

We already have paying customers, process hundreds of millions of events daily, and are seeing strong demand from PLG B2B Clients. Nicolò is an ex-BCG who has scaled two startups to millions in ARR. Arseniy worked for several years at Datadog handling billions of datapoints. We’ve worked together for 3+ years and experienced this problem firsthand in our previous startup.
one_liner: AI Agents that watch, engage and convert your users.

name: Zolvo
long_description: Commercial lenders manage billions in assets but service their loans like it's 2005: spreadsheets, legacy software, and teams of people doing manual reconciliation all day. Zolvo replaces that entire back office with AI. We automate reconciliation, verification, collections, and reporting so lenders can scale their portfolios without scaling their teams. We're building the operating system for commercial lending
one_liner: AI that automates servicing for commercial lenders

name: Elyra
long_description: Elyra is an AI reservation system for restaurants with built-in voice and email agents that handle bookings end-to-end.
one_liner: AI for Restaurant Reservations

name: Pavoot
long_description:
Pavoot is an AI agent for events that helps marketing and sales teams source the right attendees, personalize each guest’s experience, and turn events into pipeline.

Companies spend millions on events because relationships drive revenue. Yet most interactions are never captured, event experiences remain generic, and standard follow-ups fail to convert high-potential attendees.

Before the event, Pavoot identifies the attendee profiles most likely to convert and sends personalized invitations. During the event, it helps create relevant introductions and capture important conversations. After the event, it identifies top leads, generates personalized follow-ups, and syncs engagement back into the CRM.

===

Pavoot turns events into personalized customer journeys. Book a demo: pavoot.com
one_liner: AI that turns events into pipeline

name: Sherpa
long_description: Sherpa automatically increases website conversion rates by analyzing visitor behavior, building new page variants, and continuously A/B testing them. Customers typically see a 15-20% lift on their primary conversion metric in their first 30 days.
one_liner: Turn more website visitors into customers

name: RentAHuman
one_liner: Marketplace for AI agents to hire humans.

name: Andco
one_liner: End-to-end case workups for personal injury firms.

name: StableBrowse
long_description: We are making the world's fastest browser for your AI agents. Agents don’t need to see UIs like us humans do. We give agents a semantic understanding of the web instead of brittle visual interfaces. Your agents can perform deep research, large-scale scraping, and complex automation—more efficiently with our agentic browser that turns the web into a native protocol for LLMs.
one_liner: Browser for AI agents

name: Lab0
long_description:
Enterprise software implementation is broken,  and it has been for decades. 
Every rollout, whether it's a traditional ERP or a new AI system, requires months of manual integration, configuration, and tuning done by armies of system integrators and forward-deployed engineers. 
Lab0 builds agentic systems that automate this layer, compressing months-long implementations into weeks.
one_liner: Automated forward-deployed engineers (AI FDEs)

name: Napkin Math
long_description: Napkin Math is the food journal for real people. Stop counting calories, get personalized insights and realistic goals. Easily keep a beautiful food journal, get deep insights on your data with AI, and share your table with friends.
one_liner: Building Napkin Math, AI-powered food journaling for real people

name: Ontora
long_description: Ontora gives C-suite leaders AI agents that interview every employee to uncover process bottlenecks across their organization. Consultants spend months doing this manually; Ontora does it in hours.
one_liner: AI agents that interview every employee to map how work gets done.

name: Prototyping.io
long_description: Prototyping.io turns CAD designs into real mechanical parts through an AI-driven manufacturing system. We analyze designs for manufacturability and automate production workflows to deliver high-quality parts faster and at lower cost.
one_liner: Autonomous manufacturing for mechanical parts

name: Mount
long_description:
Mount is the Insurer for the Agent Economy.

When AI systems autonomously sign contracts, manage finances, or talk to customers, every failure becomes the deployer's liability. Existing insurers don't want to cover this. They lack the data, the models, and the speed to assess deployed AI systems.              

We're solving this by building a risk evaluation and mitigation platform specifically for AI Agents. Mount's platform red-teams them, scores their operational risk, and issues ADR certifications (the SOC 2 for AI agents). Every evaluation generates proprietary risk data that feeds our underwriting engine, a data moat no competitor can replicate.

The AI agent market is projected to grow from $7.6B to $183B by 2033. The EU AI Act and upcoming regulation require deployers to manage AI risk. Over 90% of businesses want coverage for AI risks, yet no insurer is built to price this new risk category. We are that company.

Fabian studied CS at ETH Zürich with a focus on machine learning and has been building AI systems since. John founded an AI-first media company at 18 and scaled it to 400K in annual revenue. Together, they combine deep technical AI expertise with the operational intensity to build a full-stack insurance company from scratch.
one_liner: Insure and secure your AI Agents

name: Zibra Labs
former_names: TBD. We don't have a name yet.
long_description:
Quant research is generating candidate strategies orders of magnitude faster than backtesting infrastructure can evaluate them. AI has further accelerated alpha research from a handful of signals per quarter to hundreds per day. The bottleneck has moved from researcher time to compute throughput.

We're building large HPC clusters (100 - 50,000 nodes) that can run up to 6.4M tasks in parallel across multiple cloud providers on spot instances.

Our goal is to make backtesting strategies simple, fast, and cheap at scale.
one_liner: HPC for Quant Trading Firms running backtesting at scale.

name: PLAN0 AI
long_description:
PLAN0 is an AI-powered preconstruction cost intelligence platform serving real estate developers, general contractors, and investors. We analyze architectural plans using computer vision AI models trained on tens of thousands of examples to generate detailed, industry standard cost estimates in 30 minutes vs. 2+ weeks traditionally.

The platform is also building a proprietary database of real-time localized cost data that feed its analytics and forecasting tools. Using quant finance inspired deep neural networks, PLAN0 can decompose construction costs in market observable factors to predict all local trade level costs up to 24 months out with high accuracy.

The vision is to develop the CoStar or Bloomberg of construction – a system of record and intelligence layer that allows real estate stakeholders to underwrite, design, and benchmark development projects with greater speed, precision, and confidence.
one_liner: AI powered construction cost estimation & analytics.

name: Saudara AI
long_description:
Saudara AI is an AI broker connecting American brands with vetted overseas factories. International sourcing is broken. We're fixing it.

US brands import over $3 trillion in goods every year and lose billions to ghost suppliers, hidden fees, and missed deadlines. The best factories sit behind decades-old relationships. We have them. Our AI handles the rest.

A real broker on every deal, supercharged by AI. 10x faster, at a fraction of the cost. We are the on-ramp.
one_liner: AI Broker Connecting American Brands With The World's Best Factories

name: ANORIA
long_description: We've spent decades tracking everything. Sleep. Recovery. Steps. All proxies for how we feel. Performance is 90% mental. And yet no one has built the feedback loop for our emotions. We close that loop by designing a device that understands how you feel, tells you why, and what you can do about it. Emotional intelligence becomes trainable, so you can better connect and create with those around you.
one_liner: The first wearable that reads your emotions to enhance your EQ.

name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster is an AI-native consulting firm for AI transformation, powered by agents instead of armies of consultants.

Companies are spending millions on AI tools, pilots, workshops, and roadmaps. But most confuse AI adoption with AI transformation. Adoption is buying tools. Transformation is understanding how work should change across every team, workflow, and role. Traditional consulting moves too slowly for that: a few interviews, a few workshops, a static roadmap, then the company is left to execute.

Foaster uses AI agents to go much faster and much deeper. Agents interview employees at scale, map how work actually happens, and build in days a roadmap showing what should be automated, redesigned, or improved first. Then Foaster stays embedded to keep the transformation moving through adoption tracking, deeply personalized upskilling, and continuous follow-up.

The result is the precision and scale of AI, with human experts brought in where judgment, expertise and implementation matter most.
one_liner: Agents that help your company transform for AI.

name: Eden Robotics
long_description: We're building robots that just work and use them to deliver autonomous services at scale. Our first use case is semi-humanoid robots for manufacturing and logistics. Unlike traditional robotics companies, we don't sell robots, we provide physical agents for hire where companies pay for the robots based on usage, decreasing the barrier to entry and expanding the robotics market as a whole.
one_liner: Autonomous services for humanity.

name: Aster
long_description:
We're an AI Research lab that utilizes complex agentic workflows to accelerate the discovery of novel AI research. We've discovered novel optimizers, language modelling architectures, and work in interpretability.

We develop products and conduct frontier research, pushing the bounds of automating research.
one_liner: The First AI-Native AI Research Lab

name: ProjectX
long_description:
Every computer ever made forces you to do one thing at a time. One cursor. One keyboard. One Hardware. One app in focus. Fifty years. Nobody questioned it.

We did. We started over.

We built InfinityOS, a fundamentally new computer OS on the cloud from ground up.

Infinity runs every app in its own independent computer -- own GPU, own input, own environment. Windows and Linux in the same session. Humans and agents working side by side. No concurrency ceiling. Cold start in seconds. One URL.
one_liner: Infinity: the first OS where humans and agents work with no limits.

name: Arzana
long_description: Fortune 500 companies and the fastest-growing manufacturing firms use Arzana’s AI platform to automate order entry, quoting, and customer updates. So teams can scale faster, respond sooner, and grow without adding overhead.
one_liner: AI automation for the manufacturing office

name: Indexable

one_liner: sandbox infrastructure for AI agents

name: Asendia AI

one_liner: AI Recruiters for Staffing Agencies and Enterprise

name: Gigacatalyst
long_description:
We provide a AI customization layer that learns your APIs and embeds in your product, so your customers can build their own apps on your SaaS. Each customer can now adapt your product to match their workflows perfectly, and share it across their team with our in-built app store.

The result is that customers use your SaaS more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get bespoke implementation for their exact usecase, without waiting.

We're live with the top Series B companies with 90% repeat usage rate. Our customers tell us that Gigacatalyst is the best way to increase usage, retention, and expansion in 2026.
one_liner: Customize your software to every user with AI

name: Klaimee
long_description:
Klaimee is the first insurance for your AI agents. It covers what traditional E&O and cyber explicitly carve out, so you can deploy agentic AI at scale with real peace of mind.
Built for companies deploying agentic AI, self-serve from day one.

The problem: AI agents are taking actions autonomously buying, emailing, modifying sensitive data. AB 316 already holds deployers liable. EU AI Act enforces in August. Cyber and E&O insurance are excluding AI claims. Companies shipping agents have zero coverage and no third-party proof their agent is safe. Enterprise legal asks "who pays if your agent breaks something?" and there's no good answer.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
We built the answer. Critical-category risk evaluation, certification, financial guarantee, liability insurance and the documentation enterprise procurement needs to sign off.

Team: Ines (ex-General Manager at SafetyWing, grew insurance product from $5M to $60M revenue, 5 years launching insurance products from scratch and structuring a TokioMarine MGA into its own carrier) + Julien (AI software engineer + corporate strategy, enterprise compliance).

We understand how insurance works, what enterprises require, and why startups can't wait 6 months for either.
one_liner: Liability insurance for AI Agents. You deploy agents, we cover you.

name: Modern
long_description:
Modern helps IT, HR, and Finance teams automatically resolve 80%+ of high-volume requests. Teams define workflows in plain language, set approval rules and policies, and Modern handles the rest: password resets, access provisioning, expense approvals, on-boarding checklists, and more. Everything runs with full audit trails, role-based approvals, and enterprise-grade security built in.

Modern works alongside your existing ITSM with no rip-and-replace required or runs as your ITSM from day one. Most teams are live in under a day. For teams that want to go fully hands-off, 100% automation via a fully managed IT services are also available.
one_liner: AI agents for IT, HR & Operations teams

name: ReasonBlocks
long_description: ReasonBlocks makes AI agents more accurate and cheaper by catching failures mid-run and compounding reasoning patterns across every agent you deploy. Plugs into your existing agent stack in minutes and starts improving results from the first call.
one_liner: Infra layer for smarter and cheaper AI agents
